publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 165, folios 160-161. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: Dearest W. I cannot say how vexed I am that today the rain made it quite impossible for me to go. At one o'clock, just when I was going to set out, it poured; & has done so almost without intermission ever since.-- I was going to ride to Guildford later to see you;
had it become fine; but this is now hopeless too.--
You were quite right in scolding me about yesterday. But I believe it is the only ride I have sacrificed almost this year.
You know it is much oftener a complaint that I cannot ride when I wish, or no much as I wish, than the contrary.-- Really I can recal no other instance this season. So do not make a mountain out of a
I am rather more gay today; but much annoyed indeed about the weather.--
